title: The photo my grandfather should have burned.
alternativeTitles: 1954: Something is wrong with this photograph.
Look closely at the stairs in this 1954 photo.
Did he capture a ghost in 1954?
Found this in my grandfather’s attic. I'm terrified.
Don’t zoom in on the 1954 photograph.
The mystery of the infinite staircase.
He never should have taken this picture.
Something is hiding in my grandfather's photo.
description: My grandfather took this photo in 1954, but a closer look reveals a staircase that defies logic and reason. Can you see what I'm seeing? Follow for daily mysteries and eerie stories.
